name: One-Click YouTube Shorts Script and Storyboard Generator
description: Takes a topic, researches trending short-form content via Exa, generates a complete YouTube Shorts script with Claude AI including voiceover text, visual storyboard, and music cues, saves to Google Drive, and logs to Sheets.

source.originalName: One-click YouTube shorts generator with Leonardo AI, GPT and ElevenLabs

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for trend research

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for production log

topic.description: Topic or prompt for the YouTube Short (e.g. '5 AI tools you need to know')

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for production log

steps.name: Build Exa query for trending short-form content
Research trending Shorts content via Exa
Build Claude prompt for Shorts script generation
Generate Shorts package with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build production document for Google Drive
Save production package to Google Drive
Notify Slack of Shorts production completion
